---
name: Documentation
about: Report a problem or suggest an improvement to the documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["type: documentation", "status: triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What is the documentation issue?

A clear and concise description of what is wrong, missing, or unclear.

## Where is it?

Link to the file(s) or page(s) affected (e.g. `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, a section heading).

## Suggested improvement

What would make it clearer or more complete?
